CVT_X95_L38_L43_PPSR

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "006B",
    "version": "0054"
  },

    "version": "0054"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "20",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "006B",
    "version": "0054"
  }
]

    "name": "Primary revolution speed sensor failure"

    "name": "Invalid data received from ECM"
  },

  },

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 21,
    "sentbytes": "2181",
    "name": "Read VIN",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Vehicle Identification Number": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "CRC": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "5100",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "11FF",
    "name": "ECUReset",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "ResetMode": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "23000000000000",
    "name": "Read Memory By Address",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Memory address": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Memory size": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Record values": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B8100000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "Write VIN",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Vehicle Identification Number": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "CRC": {
        "firstbyte": 20
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3BB0000000",
